_meta.operation: regenerate-and-replace (contract §6): delete all existing rows, insert this set wholesale
_meta.projection_rule: Stable Part 1/Part 2 + Part 3 R-items (R1 35 vasculitis variants, R2 exclusion, R4 dormancy). EXCLUDES all Part 3 Q-items (Q1 confirm-29, Q4 threshold-as-judgment, Q5 buckets, Q6 CNS/candidate indications). M1/M2 non-blocking.
_meta.review_status: AWAITING NICK VISIBILITY CHECK before wholesale delete/replace of the 48 live rows. Destructive op; feeds a live pipeline.

rules.rule_value: {"regex":"\\b[rR]?AAV[0-9rhu]*\\b","substring_case_insensitive":["adeno-associated virus","adeno-associated viral"],"co_occurrence":{"any_of":["capsid","serotype","transduction","viral delivery","vector"],"or_intervention_type_in":["GENETIC","BIOLOGICAL"]}}
rules.notes: v3 Part 2 positive signal: website modality vocabulary. Stable from v2. AAV anchor + vector mechanism.

rules.rule_value: {"branded_phrases":["gene therapy","gene therapies","genetic medicine","genetic medicines","cell and gene therap","gene and biologic therap","gene-to-cell","cell-and-gene"],"and_no_aav_anchor":true,"route_to":"needs_aav_review","confidence":"low"}
rules.notes: v3 Part 2 disambiguation rule 5: gene-therapy-branded, no AAV terms -> needs_aav_review, not auto-reject.

rules.rule_value: {"intervention_type_in":["GENETIC"],"and_conditions_in_indication_list":"canonical_aav_indications","and_disease_aav_filter_did_not_trigger":true}
rules.notes: v3 Part 2 positive signal: CT.gov L2 trial evidence. Outranks website (disambiguation rule 2).

rules.rule_value: {"source":"salesforce_account_tag","tag":"AAV","confidence":"high","action":"auto_add_confirmed"}

rules.rule_value: Hemophilia A|Hemophilia B|Ornithine Transcarbamylase Deficiency|Wilson Disease|Glycogen Storage Disease Type Ia|Von Gierke|Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy|Friedreich's Ataxia|Gaucher Disease|Spinal Muscular Atrophy|Mucopolysaccharidosis|Sanfilippo Syndrome|Leber Congenital Amaurosis|Retinitis Pigmentosa|RPE65|Choroideremia|Pompe Disease|Aromatic L-amino acid decarboxylase deficiency|AADC deficiency|Crigler-Najjar|Methylmalonic Acidemia|Phenylketonuria|Hunter Syndrome|Hurler Syndrome|Niemann-Pick|Arrhythmogenic Right Ventricular Cardiomyopathy|Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy|Heart Failure|Angelman Syndrome|Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia

rules.rule_value: {"match_method":"normalize then match: lowercase, decode HTML entities, collapse/insert whitespace, strip punctuation","variants":["ANCA Associated Vasculitis","ANCA-associated Vasculitis","ANCA-Associated Vasculitis","ANCA-Associated Vasculitis (AAV)","ANCA Associated Vasculitis (AAV)","ANCA Associated Systemic Vasculitis","ANCA Associated Systemic Vasculitis Including Wegener's","ANCA-Associated Glomerulonephritis","ANCA-IgG-positive ANCA Associated Vasculitis","ANCA-associated Vasculitides","ANCA-associated Primary Necrotizing Vasculitides","Antineutrophilic Cytoplasmic Antibody (ANCA)- Associated Vasculitis (AAV)","Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody-Associated Vasculitis","Anti-neutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody-associated Vasculitis","Anti-Neutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody-Associated Vasculitis","Anti-Neutrophil Cytoplasm Antibodies (ANCA) Associated Vasculitis","Anti-Neutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody","Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody Positive Vasculitis","Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody Associated Vasculitis","Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody (ANCA)-associated Nephritis (AAGN)","MPO-ANCA Vasculitis","Granulomatosis With Polyangiitis","Granulomatosis With Polyangiitis (GPA)","Granulomatosis With Polyangiitis (Wegener's)","Granulomatous Polyangiitis","Microscopic Polyangiitis","Microscopic Polyangiitis (MPA)","Eosinophilic Granulomatosis With Polyangiitis","EosinphilicGranulomatosis With Polyangiitis","Wegener's Granulomatosis","Wegener Granulomatosis","Wegeners Granulomatosis","Churg-Strauss Syndrome","Churg Strauss Syndrome"],"and_no_canonical_indication":true,"action":"reject"}
rules.notes: v3 Part 3 R1 (machine-resolved, pending ratification). 35 CT.gov-observed variants. THE keystone homonym fix. Subsumes R2 (Amgen/Fate/Nkarta caught here). Traps: missing-space EosinphilicGranulomatosis (NCT02126098), HTML-entity Wegener's (NCT07176546).

rules.rule_value: {"dormant_if":"no interventional trial with start or last-update date in last 5 years AND no trial in Recruiting/Active-not-recruiting/Enrolling status","action":"deny high-confidence trial-evidence pass; route to review","confirmed_dormant":["Tacere Therapeutics","Avigen","Ceregene","Neurologix"]}
rules.notes: v3 Part 3 R4 (machine-resolved, pending ratification). 5yr threshold is the machine default; the threshold-as-commercial-judgment is Q4 (Ellie), excluded. Per-company dormancy facts are machine-resolved.

rules.rule_value: {"status":"PENDING_M2_EXTRACTION","action_when_populated":"route to needs_data_quality_review; do not resolve to parent","known_examples":["Astellas","Novartis","Solid Biosciences"]}

rules.rule_value: {"Lentiviral":"Reagent-readiness pitch, viral-vector framing without AAV-specifics","Peptide therapeutics":"Tools provider / nextgen antibody play","Small molecule":"Hold, no current pitch","RNA editing":"Hold, no current pitch","mRNA therapeutics":"Hold, possible LNP-reagent angle later","Autologous cell therapy":"Cell therapy reagent pitch","Allogeneic cell therapy":"Cell therapy reagent pitch","Non-viral delivery":"Hold","Antibody / biologic":"Hold","CRISPR / gene editing (non-viral)":"Hold","Epigenetic reprogramming":"Hold","Vaccine":"Hold","Diagnostic / research tools only":"Archive, no fit"}

{"type":"firmographic","rule":"company develops/manufactures/contract-manufactures AAV-based gene therapies per published platform/pipeline/product","multi_vector_cdmo_only_if":"AAV named in services"}
{"type":"firmographic","rule":"at least one program in preclinical / IND-enabling / Phase I / Phase II"}
{"type":"firmographic","rule":"headcount < 2000 AND not wholly-owned subsidiary of top-20 global pharma under parent CMC; independent AAV CDMOs included at any headcount"}
{"type":"firmographic","rule":"company HQ or contact primary work location in United States or Canada"}

{"type":"demographic","rule":"contact owns/leads/executes PD, manufacturing, or CMC for the AAV program","title_patterns":["process development","viral vector","downstream processing","purification","vector manufacturing","gene therapy manufacturing","CMC","process science"],"shortcut":"CSO at company under 200 employees"}
{"type":"demographic","rule":"Director / Senior Director / Head of / VP / SVP; EXCEPTION: at >500-employee non-CDMO companies, VP and above EXCLUDED"}
{"type":"demographic","rule":"contact current employer matches the targeted AAV company; past AAV experience elsewhere does not satisfy"}
{"signal":"Series A+ round, IPO, or major strategic investment in last 45 days"}

rules.rule_value: {"signal":"contact or same-domain contact has logged BD meeting / scheduled meetings / active sales-thread CC in last 6 months; lapsed >2yr NOT disqualified"}
{"signal":"contact presently sequenced in any other active Teknova cadence; concurrent enrollment only, not historical"}
{"signal":"end date on current role OR open-to-work badge OR retiring/retired OR role change >6mo ago without confirmed new employer"}
{"signal":"domain redirects to parent/acquirer OR LinkedIn marked inactive OR publicly ceased operations OR leadership departed to named acquirer"}
{"signal":"title/responsibilities include direct patient care, patient-side trial coordination, nursing, or work product is patient interaction"}
{"signal":"primary function Legal, Sales, Talent Acquisition, Marketing, IT, Finance, Regulatory, Program Management, or QC; Regulatory explicitly banned"}
{"signal":"career history primarily agronomy, ag science, plant biology, or vet work without documented pivot into human cell/gene therapy"}
{"signal":"email status hard-bounced, do-not-contact, or opt-out"}
